projects.name: stack over papers
projects.description: an open community and repository for exploring, discussing, and annotating computer science papers and technical readings, making research more accessible and collaborative.

projects.name: vemi
projects.description: a tiny, type-safe markdown compiler. plain text in, html out.

projects.name: nudge
projects.description: lightweight self-motivation daemon that sends you randomized, time-blocked messages throughout the day.

projects.name: fauthy
projects.description: an open-source and secure command-line totp manager with local encryption.

projects.name: campusnacks
projects.description: a food delivery service for campus areas, focused on local vendors.

projects.name: dependabot
projects.description: the dependency checker for git repositories automates the monitoring of composer.json and package.json files. it compares dependencies with their registries every 24 hours and emails a detailed report to recipients.
